# Crypto Funding Options

This project accepts crypto donations outside of GitHub Sponsors. GitHub's `FUNDING.yml` only supports official funding platforms, so custom cryptocurrency addresses are documented here.

## BTC
- Network: BTC
- Address: `1H7BC5NSmJxZDpVf6zCaaLuB7MqwS3pE2H`

## ETH
- Network: ERC20
- Address: `0x4f50fa7532a9316a4e7fe7dff4e279d290119c6f`
- Network: BEP20
- Address: `0x4f50fa7532a9316a4e7fe7dff4e279d290119c6f`
